# Basic MCP Calculator Server Test
# Tests server startup, initialization, and basic protocol handling

# Build the calculator server binary
go build -o mcp-calculator-server .

# Test basic MCP protocol initialization
exec mcp-calculator-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/list","params":{},"id":2}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"ping","params":{},"id":3}
EOF

# Verify server information in initialization response
stdout '"name":"mcp-calculator-server"'
stdout '"version":"0.1.0"'

# Verify capabilities are reported
stdout '"tools"'

# Verify all calculator tools are listed
stdout '"name":"calculate"'
stdout '"description":"Perform basic arithmetic calculations'
stdout '"name":"advanced_math"'
stdout '"description":"Perform advanced mathematical operations'
stdout '"name":"statistics"'
stdout '"description":"Calculate statistical measures'
stdout '"name":"convert_units"'
stdout '"description":"Convert between different units'

# Verify ping response
stdout '"result":"pong"'
